home.title: History
home.description: Here you can review the completed journey that Alexander has taken

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Here you can get familiar with Alexander's resume

0.title: Olympiad
0.description: In 2019, I joined a programming club where I solved algorithmic problems of different levels, first in PascalABC and then in C++. I also took part in several olympiads on behalf of the public school that organized the club. The last time, I reached the regional stage, but I did not have enough points to qualify for the final republican stage. After that, I stopped attending the club.

1.title: E-commerce, Telegram bots, freelance, self-education
1.description: In the summer of 2024, I started learning Python development. I studied basic syntax, PHP, Composer, lambda functions, decorators, iterators, OOP, list comprehensions, generator expressions, Flask and Django. To run a small commercial business, I also immersed myself in Telegram bot development. I began building Telegram bots for clients and for personal projects. My dropshipping bot on Telegram is @Planoise_test_bot.

2.title: Joining IUT de Marne-la-Vallee
2.description: In 2024, I joined MMI. This program combines several disciplines: marketing, graphics, design and programming. In programming, we studied web layout basics with HTML and CSS, the fundamentals of JavaScript and PHP, and how to work with the MySQL database management system.

3.title: Self-education
3.description: Since February 2025, I have continued studying independently in several areas: front-end, back-end and DevOps. For front-end, I studied React, Next.js, Tailwind, Sass, Framer Motion and Three.js. To build APIs, I learned OOP in PHP, the Laravel framework and Redis. For deployment, I studied containerization with Docker, discovered Nginx for port forwarding, and started working with Amazon S3 buckets for remote media and audio storage. Since the beginning of this self-education period at the end of February 2025, I have created two projects with Next.js.

about.text: Freelance developer focused on e-commerce solutions, with experience building Telegram bots and sales-oriented websites. I deliver end-to-end projects for small and medium-sized businesses: sales automation, payment management, development, deployment and customer support. I am currently in my first year of BUT Informatique at IUT de Marne-la-Vallee, while continuing to develop my programming skills independently.

tasks.0: Creation and management of an online store offering subscriptions to popular AI services, grouped into a single subscription.
Creation and management of a marketplace dedicated to beat licenses.
tasks.1: Sale of subscriptions to a copyright protection service.

tasks.0: Developed e-commerce Telegram bots for selling services and digital products with Telegram Bot API and payments, improving sales automation for SMEs.
tasks.1: Designed and deployed complete online sales solutions, including payment management, subscriptions and customer support, from conception to deployment.
tasks.2: Built conversion-oriented websites for selling music licenses and additional services such as late checkout and pet-friendly options, improving offer clarity and user experience.
tasks.3: Provided post-delivery maintenance and technical support, ensuring the stability of production solutions.

tasks.0: Sold subscriptions to online services through an e-commerce Telegram bot, covering full project management, development, deployment and customer support.
English to Russian translation on the Unbabel platform.

precisions.0: Second-degree diploma for passing the regional stage of the state olympiad in competitive programming and algorithmic problem solving;
Silver medal for 2nd place in a Gazprom singles tennis tournament in 2018;
precisions.1: Silver medal for 2nd place in a Gazprom doubles tennis tournament in 2019;
